title: 2Pcs Silicone Paint Brushes,1 Inch & 2 Inch Flat Silicone Paint Brushes,Silicone Colour Shaper Brush Set,Solid Flat Flexible Paintbrush Set Color Shaper Painting Tool for Acrylic Paints Watercolor
features: What you will receive: you will get 2 pieces silicone brushes, 2 size, can fully meet your needs for different sizes

Reliable Material: The flat silicone brush is mainly made of quality silicone, wood and metal material. The solid brush head is smooth, cut well and connected firmly with the wooden handle, so that you can paint preciously and accurately. Comfortable to hold, easy to use, and can serve you for a long time with confidence.

Product Size: The larger silicon painting brush is about 19.5cm/7.67inch*5cm/1.96inch and the smaller one is about 18cm/7.08inch*2.2cm/0.86inch. Different sizes can meet your different painting needs.
Easy to Clean: The silicone material is smooth so as to clean more easily. Just wash them by water and soap after finishing painting, then dry them naturally or wipe them by dish towel.
Wide Application: Ideal for brushing oil paints, acrylics and watercolours, it is the ideal colouring tool. Also suitable for artistic portraits, creative illustrations, miniatures etc.
description: Specification: Color: as shown in the picture Material: silicone, wood and metal material The large one: 19.5cm/7.67inch*5cm/1.96inch The small one: 18cm/7.08inch*2.2cm/0.86inch Package details: 2 x silicone painting brush silicone brush for painting, moving paint and removing paint smoothly and accurately. Use as a squeegee to pull paint smoothly across a canvas
